series_metadata.series_description: Cooperative agreements between ODPS and various law enforcement, state, and local government agencies, as well as private vendors for the purpose of information and equipment sharing, training and support, and security details.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three years after the expiration, cancellation, or renewal date of the MOU. ; Electronic: Retain for three years after the expiration, cancellation, or renewal date of the MOU., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
